sphere

Synopsis

sphere is undoable, queryable, and editable. The sphere command creates a new NURBS sphere with the given radius and number of spans.

Return value

string[] The names of the created sphere and its dependency node.

Flags

Long nameShort nameArgument typeDescription
radiusrlinearThe radius of the sphere.
spanssintThe number of spans of the sphere.
namenstringName of the resulting node.

MEL Examples

// Create a sphere of radius 5
sphere -r 5 -name "mySphere";
// Query the radius
sphere -q -r mySphere;
